channel.title: Culture on The Cogitating Ceviche
channel.description: Recent content in Culture on The Cogitating Ceviche

item.title: Technical Debt as Cultural Debt
item.description:
Technical Debt as Cultural DebtThere is a button in a hospital that no one is supposed to press.It is not labeled “do not press.” It is labeled something innocuous, something functional, something that once described a process that no longer exists…

Read the full article on Substack

item.title: Cogitating Ceviché’s Week in Review (25-44)
item.description:
The Cogitating Ceviché is a . , .Discussion via NotebookLMEditorial SummaryThis week’s pieces hold a reflective mirror to the cultures we inhabit—religious, digital, domestic and literary—and ask whether allegiance to those spaces means adaptation,…

Read the full article on Substack
